notableEvents.label: Michael Busch pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Seiya Suzuki scores. Dansby Swanson scores. Michael Busch to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Seiya Suzuki scores. Dansby Swanson scores. Michael Busch to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Bryan Reynolds.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Billy Cook.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly singles on a line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz. Scott Kingery scores. Ian Happ to 3rd. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Matt Shaw. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Nick Yorke out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Matt Shaw. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Nick Yorke out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin plunked
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin hit by pitch. Marcell Ozuna to 3rd. Spencer Horwitz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Lowe grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Lowe hits a grand slam (4) to right center field. Marcell Ozuna scores. Spencer Horwitz scores. Konnor Griffin scores.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nick Yorke hit by pitch. Ryan O'Hearn to 2nd.
